items.title: Cross-format Discovery discovery
items.name: Cross-format Discovery discovery
items.summary: Planned discovery on how aggressively Spotify should blend music, podcasts, and audiobooks in listener entry surfaces.
items.opportunity: Clarify where cross-format discovery adds value versus where it creates noise.

linkedInitiatives.description: Planned initiative to improve how Spotify introduces listeners to adjacent audio formats without reducing relevance.

riskFocus.question: How much cross-format blending actually improves listener value?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Moderate, context-sensitive cross-format recommendations improve depth more than aggressive mixing.

plannedActivities: Compare engagement by listener habit cohort.
items.decisionToMake: Decide the appropriate level of cross-format blending for Q3.
